summary: User Control Room Testing Complete - All 11 backend tests PASSED, All UI tests PASSED. Users section now has a single 'Control Room' button per row (old buttons Dettagli/Ruoli/Disabilita/Elimina replaced). Modal opens with 4 tabs: Info & Profilo, Modifica, Leghe & Ruoli, Attivita. New GET /api/rbac/users/{user_id}/audit-log endpoint working correctly.

user_control_room_ui.single_control_room_button: PASS - Each user row has single 'Control Room' button (73 buttons found)
user_control_room_ui.old_buttons_removed: PASS - Old 'Dettagli' and 'Ruoli' buttons are NOT present
user_control_room_ui.four_tabs: PASS - Modal has 4 tabs: Info & Profilo, Modifica, Leghe & Ruoli, Attivita
user_control_room_ui.tab_testids: PASS - All tabs have correct data-testid: ucr-tab-info, ucr-tab-edit, ucr-tab-leagues, ucr-tab-activity

info_tab_features.user_details_grid: PASS - Shows ID, Email, Username, Auth Provider, Registrato, Ultimo Login, Ultima Attivita, Stato (8/8 fields)
info_tab_features.league_counters: PASS - Shows Leghe Create, Admin Lega, Membro counters

modifica_tab_features.reset_password_button: PASS - 'Genera Link Reset Password' button present (not shown for Google users)
modifica_tab_features.toggle_super_admin: PASS - Promuovi/Rimuovi Super Admin button present
modifica_tab_features.soft_delete_confirmation: PASS - Requires typing DELETE to confirm

leghe_ruoli_tab_features.user_leagues_table: PASS - Shows user's leagues table (or 'Nessuna lega' message)
leghe_ruoli_tab_features.rbac_roles_assignment: PASS - Shows RBAC role checkboxes with role names and descriptions

attivita_tab_features.audit_log_display: PASS - Shows audit log entries in table format
attivita_tab_features.columns: PASS - Table has Data, Azione, Tipo, Dettagli columns
attivita_tab_features.role_indicator: PASS - Shows whether user was Actor or Target of each action

api_endpoints.GET_users_list: PASS - /api/rbac/users returns user list with required fields

access_control.non_admin_denied_users: PASS - Non-admin users denied access to users list (403)
access_control.non_admin_denied_audit: PASS - Non-admin users denied access to audit log (403)

verified_features: Users table has single 'Control Room' button per row (replaces old Dettagli/Ruoli/Disabilita/Elimina buttons)
User Control Room modal opens with 4 tabs: Info & Profilo, Modifica, Leghe & Ruoli, Attivita
Tab test-ids: ucr-tab-info, ucr-tab-edit, ucr-tab-leagues, ucr-tab-activity
User row test-id: control-user-{id}
Info tab shows user details grid: ID, email, username, auth provider, registration date, last login, last activity
Info tab shows online/offline status indicator
Info tab shows RBAC roles and league counters (Leghe Create, Admin Lega, Membro)
Modifica tab shows editable username and email fields with 'Salva Modifiche Profilo' button
Modifica tab shows 'Genera Link Reset Password' button (hidden for Google users)
Modifica tab has Danger Zone with Disabilita/Riabilita, Promuovi/Rimuovi Super Admin, Elimina Utente (Soft) buttons
Soft delete requires typing DELETE to confirm
Leghe & Ruoli tab shows user's leagues table
Leghe & Ruoli tab shows RBAC role assignment checkboxes with Salva Ruoli button
Attivita tab shows audit log entries via GET /api/rbac/users/{user_id}/audit-log endpoint
Attivita tab displays Data, Azione, Tipo, Dettagli columns with Actor/Target indicator
Backend: GET /api/rbac/users/{user_id}/audit-log returns audit entries where user is actor or target
Edit user (PUT /api/rbac/users/{user_id}) endpoint working
Toggle user status endpoint working
Toggle Super Admin endpoint working
Role assignment (Salva Ruoli) endpoint working
critical_code_review_comments: Audit log endpoint correctly filters by user as actor (admin_id) OR target (entity_id)
All User Control Room functions have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Soft delete confirmation uses same DELETE typing pattern as role deletion
Modal structure follows same pattern as League Control Room (L2)

test_credentials.admin: admin@fantapronostic.com / admin123 (Super Admin with audit log entries)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing users for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Control Room fully implemented and tested. Pattern matches League Control Room (L2). Users table now has single Control Room button per row. 4 tabs working: Info & Profilo (user details + RBAC roles + league counters), Modifica (edit fields + Danger Zone), Leghe & Ruoli (user's leagues + RBAC assignment), Attivita (audit log entries). New API: GET /api/rbac/users/{user_id}/audit-log returns entries where user is actor or target.

mocked_api.note: Password reset link delivery is manual (displayed to admin for copying)
